title: Fresh Light Croatian Iceberg Lettuce Salad
description: A sweet and creamy Croatian dish featuring iceberg lettuce, perfect for a light lunch, this salad is also FODMAP-friendly and easy to make.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the chilled iceberg lettuce, diced poached chicken breast, sliced cucumber, grated carrots, and diced red bell pepper.
In a small bowl, whisk together the plain Greek yogurt, honey, lemon juice, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Pour the yogurt dressing over the lettuce mixture and toss to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, give the salad a good stir and adjust the seasoning if needed.
Serve the salad chilled, garnished with additional sliced cucumber and carrots if desired.
Poach the chicken breast in boiling water at 180 degrees Fahrenheit for 15-20 minutes, or until cooked through.
Let the chicken breast cool to room temperature before dicing and adding to the salad.
To toast the carrots, place them on a baking sheet and bake in a preheated oven at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-12 minutes, or until slightly tender.
Let the carrots cool to room temperature before adding to the salad.
